# Harvous

> Harvous is a Bible study notes app — a Bible notes alternative focused on helping you remember and reconnect with what you saved from Scripture.

Harvous is not a Bible reader. It is not built around sermon transcription or AI-generated sermon summaries. You keep your favorite Bible app for reading; Harvous is where your study notes, highlights, and scripture-linked insights live — organized in threads and folders so you can find them again.

## Key differentiators

- Notes-first: scripture pills, highlights, and references linked to your writing
- No built-in Bible reader — type a reference, open the text inline, keep studying in your notes
- No sermon transcription focus — capture what matters to you, not auto-generated transcripts
- Recall and review: resurface notes, highlights, and passages worth revisiting
- Spaces, threads, and folders that organize themselves around what you study
